verses.text: Pasian aw, nangma thutang, kumpipa hilh in la, nangma thuman, kumpi tapa hilh in
Amah in thumanna tawh na mite tungah thu khen hen la, na mizawngte tungah thu a tangin khen ta hen
Mual liante leh mual neute in thumanna tawh na mite-a' dingin nopna tampi piangsak ta hen
Amah in mizawngte-a' ding thu a manin khen hen la, mi cimawhte tungah suahtakna pia-in, midang a nengniamte sucipgawp ta hen
Ni leh kha a omlaiteng, khang tawntungin amah hing ta hen
Amah pen pawn lak lopa tungah a kia guah, lei a kawtsak guahzu tawh kibang ta hen
Ama hun sungin thuman pung hen la, khapi a bei mateng nopna om ta hen
Ama ukna, tuipi khat pan tuipi khat, Gunpi panin leimong dongin om tawntung ta hen
Ama galte khempeuh ama mai-ah kun uh hen la, amah a langpangte leilak kiden'na uh hen
Tarshish kumpite leh tuikulh neu-a kumpite in ama tungah siah pia uh hen la, Sheba leh Seba kumpite in letsong puak ta uh hen
Kumpi khempeuh ama mai-ah bok uh hen la, minam khempeuh in ama na sem ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh mi cimawhte in a koh ciangin amah in honkhia a, mizawng, a huh ding a omlote amah in a honkhia hi
A thakiam, a cimawh mite amah in hehpih a, mi cimawhte' nuntakna amah in a honkhia hi
Amah in amaute pammaihsa ahih manin netniamna leh ngong hihna panin amaute a honkhia hi
Amah a khan' sau hen la, Sheba gama khamte ama tungah kipia ta hen. Ama-a' dingin thu kingetsak tawntung hen la, sunthapai-in ama-a' dingin thupha kingetsak ta hen
Gamsung khempeuhah an tampi tak piang hen la, mual liante dawnah dim mema-in Lebanon gam hoih sung bang ta hen la, gamlaka lopate bangin khuapite sunga om mite pung ta uh hen
Ama min kip tawntung hen la, a minthan'na kip paisuak hen. Ama hangin mite in thupha ngah hen la, minam khempeuh in amah pen thupha ngahpa, ci ta uh hen
Na lamdangte a bawl amah bek ahi Israel Pasian, Topa in thupha ngah ta hen
A minthang ama min in thupha ngah tawntung hen la, ama minthan'na tawh leitung khempeuh kidim ta hen. Amen! Amen
Jessi' tapa David' thungetnate a beita ahi hi.
